citation: Ashton, M. C., & Lee, K. (2009). The HEXACO-60: A short measure of the major dimensions of personality. Journal of Personality Assessment, 91, 340-345.
response_scale: 1 = strongly disagree, 2 = disagree, 3 = neutral, 4 = agree, 5 = strongly agree

hex1.text: I would be quite bored by a visit to an art gallery.

hex2.text: I clean my office or home quite frequently.

hex3.text: I rarely hold a grudge, even against people who have badly wronged me.

hex4.text: I feel reasonably satisfied with myself overall.

hex5.text: I would feel afraid if I had to travel in bad weather conditions.

hex6.text: If I want something from a person I dislike, I will act very nicely toward that person in order to get it.

hex7.text: I'm interested in learning about the history and politics of other countries.

hex8.text: When working, I often set ambitious goals for myself.

hex9.text: People sometimes tell me that I am too critical of others.

hex10.text: I rarely express my opinions in group meetings.

hex11.text: I sometimes can't help worrying about little things.

hex12.text: If I knew that I could never get caught, I would be willing to steal a million dollars.

hex13.text: I would like a job that requires following a routine rather than being creative.

hex14.text: I often check my work over repeatedly to find any mistakes.

hex15.text: People sometimes tell me that I'm too stubborn.

hex16.text: I avoid making "small talk" with people.

hex17.text: When I suffer from a painful experience, I need someone to make me feel comfortable.

hex18.text: Having a lot of money is not especially important to me.

hex19.text: I think that paying attention to radical ideas is a waste of time.

hex20.text: I make decisions based on the feeling of the moment rather than on careful thought.

hex21.text: People think of me as someone who has a quick temper.

hex22.text: I am energetic nearly all the time.

hex23.text: I feel like crying when I see other people crying.

hex24.text: I am an ordinary person who is no better than others.

hex25.text: I wouldn't spend my time reading a book of poetry.

hex26.text: I plan ahead and organize things, to avoid scrambling at the last minute.

hex27.text: My attitude toward people who have treated me badly is "forgive and forget".

hex28.text: I think that most people like some aspects of my personality.

hex29.text: I don't mind doing jobs that involve dangerous work.

hex30.text: I wouldn't use flattery to get a raise or promotion at work, even if I thought it would succeed.

hex31.text: I enjoy looking at maps of different places.

hex32.text: I often push myself very hard when trying to achieve a goal.

hex33.text: I generally accept people's faults without complaining about them.

hex34.text: In social situations, I'm usually the one who makes the first move.

hex35.text: I worry a lot less than most people do.

hex36.text: I would be tempted to buy stolen property if I were financially tight.

hex37.text: I would enjoy creating a work of art, such as a novel, a song, or a painting.

hex38.text: When working on something, I don't pay much attention to small details.

hex39.text: I am usually quite flexible in my opinions when people disagree with me.

hex40.text: I enjoy having lots of people around to talk with.

hex41.text: I can handle difficult situations without needing emotional support from anyone else.

hex42.text: I would like to live in a very expensive, high-class neighborhood.

hex43.text: I like people who have unconventional views.

hex44.text: I make a lot of mistakes because I don't think before I act.

hex45.text: I rarely feel anger, even when people treat me quite badly.

hex46.text: On most days, I feel cheerful and optimistic.

hex47.text: When someone I know well is unhappy, I can almost feel that person's pain myself.

hex48.text: I wouldn't want people to treat me as though I were superior to them.

hex49.text: If I had the opportunity, I would like to attend a classical music concert.

hex50.text: People often joke with me about the messiness of my room or desk.

hex51.text: If someone has cheated me once, I will always feel suspicious of that person.

hex52.text: I feel that I am an unpopular person.

hex53.text: When it comes to physical danger, I am very fearful.

hex54.text: If I want something from someone, I will laugh at that person's worst jokes.

hex55.text: I would be very bored by a book about the history of science and technology.

hex56.text: Often when I set a goal, I end up quitting without having reached it.

hex57.text: I tend to be lenient in judging other people.

hex58.text: When I'm in a group of people, I'm often the one who speaks on behalf of the group.

hex59.text: I rarely, if ever, have trouble sleeping due to stress or anxiety.

hex60.text: I would never accept a bribe, even if it were very large.

hex61.text: People have often told me that I have a good imagination.

hex62.text: I always try to be accurate in my work, even at the expense of time.

hex63.text: When people tell me that I'm wrong, my first reaction is to argue with them.

hex64.text: I prefer jobs that involve active social interaction to those that involve working alone.

hex65.text: Whenever I feel worried about something, I want to share my concern with another person.

hex66.text: I would like to be seen driving around in a very expensive car.

hex67.text: I think of myself as a somewhat eccentric person.

hex68.text: I don't allow my impulses to govern my behavior.

hex69.text: Most people tend to get angry more quickly than I do.

hex70.text: People often tell me that I should try to cheer up.

hex71.text: I feel strong emotions when someone close to me is going away for a long time.

hex72.text: I think that I am entitled to more respect than the average person is.

hex73.text: Sometimes I like to just watch the wind as it blows through the trees.

hex74.text: When working, I sometimes have difficulties due to being disorganized.

hex75.text: I find it hard to fully forgive someone who has done something mean to me.

hex76.text: I sometimes feel that I am a worthless person.

hex77.text: Even in an emergency I wouldn't feel like panicking.

hex78.text: I wouldn't pretend to like someone just to get that person to do favors for me.

hex79.text: I've never really enjoyed looking through an encyclopedia.

hex80.text: I do only the minimum amount of work needed to get by.

hex81.text: Even when people make a lot of mistakes, I rarely say anything negative.

hex82.text: I tend to feel quite self-conscious when speaking in front of a group of people.

hex83.text: I get very anxious when waiting to hear about an important decision.

hex84.text: I'd be tempted to use counterfeit money, if I were sure I could get away with it.

hex85.text: I don't think of myself as the artistic or creative type.

hex86.text: People often call me a perfectionist.

hex87.text: I find it hard to compromise with people when I really think I'm right.

hex88.text: The first thing that I always do in a new place is to make friends.

hex89.text: I rarely discuss my problems with other people.

hex90.text: I would get a lot of pleasure from owning expensive luxury goods.

hex91.text: I find it boring to discuss philosophy.

hex92.text: I prefer to do whatever comes to mind, rather than stick to a plan.

hex93.text: I find it hard to keep my temper when people insult me.

hex94.text: Most people are more upbeat and dynamic than I generally am.

hex95.text: I remain unemotional even in situations where most people get very sentimental.

hex96.text: I want people to know that I am an important person of high status.

hex97.text: I have sympathy for people who are less fortunate than I am.

hex98.text: I try to give generously to those in need.

hex99.text: It wouldn't bother me to harm someone I didn't like.

hex100.text: People see me as a hard-hearted person.
